/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ahfl_decreases_symmetry_tests.dir/unit/compiler/syntax/frontend/decreases_symmetry.cpp.o -o ahfl_decreases_symmetry_tests  ../src/compiler/syntax/frontend/libahfl_compiler_syntax.a ../src/tooling/formatter/libahfl_tooling_formatter.a ../src/compiler/syntax/frontend/libahfl_compiler_syntax.a ../src/compiler/syntax/parser/libahfl_compiler_syntax_parser.a ../third_party/antlr4/libantlr4_runtime.a -framework CoreFoundation ../src/base/json/libahfl_base_json.a
